subcodes.title: Words to some Zoroastrian farmers, spoken on 1915-02-26
subcodes.first_line: Giving is a divine quality. Blessed are those who give! When we were in Baghdad we had an Arab Bahá'í who lived nine miles out of the city.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @being a source of light; guidance
